check.cmd: grep -q '"version": "0.2.0"' plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json && grep -q 'version = "0.2.0"' pyproject.toml && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_version_consistency.py 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | grep -q passed

items.text: Version bumped to 0.2.0 in plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json and pyproject.toml; version-consistency test green

Release notes drafted (what shipped since v0.1.0, including the two state-format breaks: gap filename migration and structured-only resolutions); bump committed and PR raised - PR merge is the operator's
After the operator merges: tag v0.2.0 on the merged main commit and GitHub release created (executing the operator's 'new release' instruction); tag == plugin.json version

dod.preamble: Release v0.2.0 per RELEASING.md: bump, verify, PR (operator merges), tag + GitHub release on the merged commit (operator-instructed).
